Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to analyze the event log for P2P process Standard P2P steps Create Purchase Requisition Approve Purchase Requisition Issue Purchase Order Receive Goods Vendor Invoice Received Match Invoice to PO Release Payment Close Case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Typical order Requisition approval PO goods receipt invoice received invoice matching payment close Payment should be after matching and ideally after goods receipt to confirm delivery

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 1001 Create Purchase Requisition Approve Purchase Requisition Issue Purchase Order Receive Goods Vendor Invoice Received Match Invoice to PO Release Payment Close Case That looks standard

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1002 Create Purchase Requisition Issue Purchase Order Vendor Invoice Received Release Payment Approve Purchase Requisition Receive Goods Match Invoice to PO Close Case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Purchase Order issued before requisition approved Usually PO should be issued only after requisition approval Payment released before invoice matching before receiving goods before approval of requisition Payment should be after all checks Invoice matching after payment typically matching should be done before payment Approve Purchase Requisition after PO and after payment that is illogical

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So case 1002 is highly anomalous this could indicate a control failure risky behavior fraud risk or paying for undelivered goods

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1003 Create Purchase Requisition Approve Purchase Requisition Issue Purchase Order Release Payment Vendor Invoice Received Receive Goods Match Invoice to PO Close Case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Payment released before invoice received before goods receipt before matching That is unusual payment should only be done after invoice matching and after verifying delivery Matching after payment is also out of sequence

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Possibly this could be a prepayment if contract allows but typical P2P process expects payment after invoice verification

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1004 Create Purchase Requisition Approve Purchase Requisition Receive Goods Issue Purchase Order Vendor Invoice Received Match Invoice to PO Release Payment Close Case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Receive Goods before Issue Purchase Order Typically goods are received after PO is issued because the PO authorizes the vendor to deliver goods Receiving goods without a PO is non standard and could be a control issue

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This might be a retroactive PO or a rush situation but it is still problematic because it can bypass authorization controls and allow unauthorized purchases

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Thus anomalies present in cases 1002 1003 1004 Case 1001 is normal
